Name: USlider
Description:
A simple widget that shows a sliding bar with a handle that allows you to control the value between 0..1.
 
   No Children

Variables.Name: ValueDelegate
Variables.Description: A bindable delegate to allow logic to drive the value of the widget

Variables.Name: SliderBarColor
Variables.Description: The color to draw the slider bar in.

Variables.Name: SliderHandleColor
Variables.Description: The color to draw the slider handle in.

Variables.Name: IndentHandle
Variables.Description: Whether the slidable area should be indented to fit the handle.

Variables.Name: Locked
Variables.Description: Whether the handle is interactive or fixed.

Variables.Name: StepSize
Variables.Description: The amount to adjust the value by, when using a controller or keyboard

Functions.Name: GetValue
Functions.Description: Gets the current value of the slider.

Functions.Name: SetValue
Functions.Description: Sets the current value of the slider.

Functions.Name: SetIndentHandle
Functions.Description: Sets if the slidable area should be indented to fit the handle

Functions.Name: SetLocked
Functions.Description: Sets the handle to be interactive or fixed

Functions.Name: SetStepSize
Functions.Description: Sets the amount to adjust the value by, when using a controller or keyboard

Functions.Name: SetSliderBarColor
Functions.Description: Sets the color of the slider bar

Functions.Name: SetSliderHandleColor
Functions.Description: Sets the color of the handle bar

Delegate.Name: OnMouseCaptureBegin
Delegate.Description: Invoked when the mouse is pressed and a capture begins.

Delegate.Name: OnMouseCaptureEnd
Delegate.Description: Invoked when the mouse is released and a capture ends.

Delegate.Name: OnControllerCaptureBegin
Delegate.Description: Invoked when the controller capture begins.

Delegate.Name: OnControllerCaptureEnd
Delegate.Description: Invoked when the controller capture ends.

Delegate.Name: OnValueChanged
Delegate.Description: Called when the value is changed by slider or typing.
